trajectory.model_output:
<python_code>
import numpy as np

# Get poses and extents of the red and green cubes
red_position, _, red_extent = get_object_pose("red cube", return_bbox_extent=True)
green_position, _, green_extent = get_object_pose("green cube", return_bbox_extent=True)

# Sample grasp pose for the red cube (to get correct orientation for grasping and placement)
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Open gripper before approaching
open_gripper()

# Approach the red cube with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.1)

# Perform the grasp: move down to the actual grasp position and close gripper
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube to a safe height (at least +0.2m above current Z)
safe_lift_z = grasp_position[2] + 0.2
lift_position = np.array([grasp_position[0], grasp_position[1], safe_lift_z])
goto_pose(lift_position, grasp_quaternion)

# Compute the stacking placement height on the green cube
place_z = green_position[2] + green_extent[2]/2 + red_extent[2]/2
placement_position = np.array([green_position[0], green_position[1], place_z])

# Move laterally above the green cube with approach height
approach_position = np.array([green_position[0], green_position[1], place_z + 0.1])
goto_pose(approach_position, grasp_quaternion)

# Place the red cube gently using z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(placement_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.1)

# Open gripper to release the red cube
open_gripper()

# Optionally lift up slightly after release
final_lift_z = placement_position[2] + 0.1
final_position = np.array([placement_position[0], placement_position[1], final_lift_z])
goto_pose(final_position, grasp_quaternion)
</python_code>

import numpy as np

# Get poses and extents of the red and green cubes
red_position, _, red_extent = get_object_pose("red cube", return_bbox_extent=True)
green_position, _, green_extent = get_object_pose("green cube", return_bbox_extent=True)

# Sample grasp pose for the red cube (to get correct orientation for grasping and placement)
grasp_position, grasp_quaternion = sample_grasp_pose("red cube")

# Open gripper before approaching
open_gripper()

# Approach the red cube with z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.1)

# Perform the grasp: move down to the actual grasp position and close gripper
goto_pose(grasp_position, grasp_quaternion)
close_gripper()

# Lift the red cube to a safe height (at least +0.2m above current Z)
safe_lift_z = grasp_position[2] + 0.2

# Compute the stacking placement height on the green cube

# Move laterally above the green cube with approach height

# Place the red cube gently using z_approach=0.1
goto_pose(placement_position, grasp_quaternion, z_approach=0.1)

# Optionally lift up slightly after release
